creator: igor@rtsnet.ru
text:
I'm net/tac_plus port maintainer. This port is outdated, distfile
not available at master sites and I do not want to maintain it :)

Please, remove it from ports collection.

I am tired by messages from fenner@FreeBSD.org with

Subject: FreeBSD ports: 1 unfetchable distfiles: net/tac_plus

:)

and  I am tired to answer silly questions on the program, which
some years did not use already.

;(
